entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Nutrient-rich coarse cereals with high resistance to abiotic stress used for food security and genetic resources.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress factors that millets are resistant to and respond to.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient, affordable, and nutritious food.

entities.name: MULTI-OMICS ANALYSIS
entities.description: A comprehensive and systematic analysis integrating multiple types of omics data.

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers and techniques to improve crop traits and productivity.

entities.name: MILLETDB
entities.description: A free, web-accessible, user-friendly multi-omics database platform for millets.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A specific species of millet for which graph-based pan-genomics are available in Milletdb.

entities.name: PAN-GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the entire set of genes within a species, used in Milletdb for pearl millet.

entities.name: GWAS
entities.description: Genome-wide association study used to identify genetic variants associated with specific traits.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, which is a target for improvement through genetic mining.

entities.name: FIELD
entities.description: An environmental condition characterized by no stress.

entities.name: EARLY DROUGHT
entities.description: An environmental stress condition occurring early in the growth cycle.

entities.name: LATE DROUGHT
entities.description: An environmental stress condition occurring late in the growth cycle.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of how genes and their products work to determine biological functions.

entities.name: GENE MAPPING
entities.description: A tool in Milletdb used to determine the location of genes on a chromosome.

entities.name: CO-EXPRESSION
entities.description: A tool in Milletdb used to analyze the simultaneous expression of genes.

entities.name: KEGG/GO ENRICHMENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A tool in Milletdb used to identify biological pathways or functions overrepresented in a gene set.

entities.name: PMA1G03779.1
entities.description: A gene identified through GWAS that modulates yield and responds to environmental stresses.

entities.name: PLATZS TFS
entities.description: A family of transcription factors that contribute to vegetative growth and abiotic stress responses.

entities.name: VEGETATIVE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the plant's vegetative organs, influenced by PLATZs TFs.

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A technique for making precise changes to the DNA of an organism to improve traits.

is used for the improvement of
is used to identify markers for
